provenance: Seeded from homework-assignment.txt and test_cases/rd_agent/*.yaml because rd-agent-mcp LangGraph LLM/embed steps require a running LM Studio at LM_STUDIO_BASE_URL (unreachable in this run). Re-run: conda activate rd-agent-mcp && cd rd-ralph-template && python -c '...ResearchGraph...' with LM Studio up.

questions.text: AES avalanche, ShiftRows, and MixColumns (AES-128 toy tracer; parts A–D).

sub_questions.text: Part A: P vs P' one-bit flip; log states rounds 0–10; byte/bit Hamming; diffusion round + 10-plaintext variant.
Part B: ShiftRows disabled; repeat Part A.
Part C: Custom MixColumns M_new; ShiftRows on; repeat Part A.
Part D: Key K vs K' one-bit flip; repeat A–C for key; tabulate.

questions.expected_outcome: Per-round state logs, Hamming metrics, figures q1-hamming-rounds, ablation plots; output/results/q1-summary.json

questions.text: ECB vs CBC on Secret.bmp with OpenSSL; random key/IV; header fix first 54 bytes; screenshots and explanation.
questions.expected_outcome: Artifacts under output/results/q2/; figures q2-ecb-noise, q2-cbc-noise, header-fixed variants

questions.text: Wireshark TLS: Client Hello suites, classify KEX/auth/cipher/mode/MAC; TLS 1.3 nuance; Server Hello; 2 browsers × 9 sites.

configs.note: YAML defines successor graph and evaluation rubric

output.message: Enable RD_AGENT_MCP_EXEC_AGENTS=true only in trusted environments to run agents/rd-agent and agents/adk-ralph subprocesses.
